SELECT u."Id", u."Email", u."DisplayName", u."Role", u.entra_oid, u."TenantId",
       t."Id" as tenant_id, t."Name", t."SchemaPrefix", t."Status", t."PlanName", t."MaxBatches", t."MaxUsers"
FROM users u
JOIN tenants t ON t."Id" = u."TenantId"
WHERE u."Email" = 'julianshaw2000@gmail.com';
EOF)
